# Holo Forensics v0.1.5

## ✨ What's Changed

- Expanded the desktop parse workflow with direct parse support, live parser-plan tracking, shared console state, cleaner split status layout, and refreshed parse telemetry behavior.
- Fixed parse progress updates so detected plans populate during direct parse runs and elapsed time continues updating through extraction and long-running artifacts.
- Refreshed the README screenshots in light and dark themes, and added a dedicated parse page preview.
- Upgraded the vendored Artemis workspace to v0.19.0 to preserve the current offline Windows parsing fixes in-repo.
- Added repository guidance in `AGENTS.md` for Artemis workflow validation and release hygiene.

## 🧪 Release Notes

- Compared with [v0.1.4](https://github.com/false00/holoForensics/releases/tag/v0.1.4), this release broadens the desktop workflow with a more capable Parse experience: you can move straight from a collection zip into parse planning, live parser-group tracking, and system telemetry without treating inspect as a hard prerequisite.
- The release also tightens parse UX details around console behavior, shared page state, and progress timing, refreshes the README screenshot set to match the current light and dark UI, and includes the vendored Artemis v0.19.0 update plus the repository guidance that landed after v0.1.4.
